rationale.R1.2: The output identifies a substantive technical inconsistency in the LFP claim and points out several methodological gaps that will draw reviewer fire.
rationale.RX.1: The output marks uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim about LFP/graphite full-cell IC peak locations.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free but with one minor regression in the form of a weak baseline comparison.
rationale.RX.5: The output blends sources without traceability; major rewrites are traced, but minor edits are not.
